Attributes.Value: 활성화 시, 다른 플레이어와 물리 충돌이 가능해집니다.

CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnBeginPlay
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
self.PhysicsRigidComponent = self.Entity.PhysicsRigidbodyComponent self.PhysicsRigidComponent:SetClientAsPhysicsOwner(self.Entity.PlayerComponent.UserId)
-- 캐릭터 머리 위에 사다리 판정 포인트를 스폰합니다. -- local topOffset = 0.35 local topPointEntity = _SpawnService:SpawnByModelId(self.Model_LadderPoint, "LadderPoint_Up", Vector3(0, topOffset, 0), self.Entity) topPointEntity.LadderSensorComponent.Owner = self.Entity topPointEntity.LadderSensorComponent.SensorType = "Top" self.TopLadderSensorEntity = topPointEntity
-- 캐릭터 발 아래에 사다리 판정 포인트를 스폰합니다. -- local bottomOffset = -0.35 local bottomPointEntity = _SpawnService:SpawnByModelId(self.Model_LadderPoint, "LadderPoint_Down", Vector3(0, bottomOffset, 0), self.Entity) bottomPointEntity.LadderSensorComponent.Owner = self.Entity bottomPointEntity.LadderSensorComponent.SensorType = "Bottom" self.BottomLadderSensorEntity = bottomPointEntity
self.HitZone = _SpawnService:SpawnByModelId("model://9ad9a4ce-6f25-47cb-9d1d-31681e1ce828", "HitZone", Vector3(0,0,0), self.Entity) self.HitZone.DistanceJointComponent:AddJoint(self.Entity, Vector2(0,0), Vector2(0,0), 0)
-- PVP 모드를 활성화합니다. --------------------------- if not self.PVPMode then self.HitZone.PhysicsColliderComponent.CollisionGroup = CollisionGroups.PlayerNonPVP self.Entity.PhysicsColliderComponent.CollisionGroup = CollisionGroups.PlayerNonPVP end
-- 점프 착지 판정 포인트를 스폰합니다. ---------------- _SpawnService:SpawnByModelId("model://fae73aa3-58c1-4986-bbb7-6e68f5d022e7", "BoundSensor", Vector3(0, bottomOffset, 0), self.Entity)

CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnUpdate
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
if self.Entity ~= _UserService.LocalPlayer then return end
if not self.CanJump then self.JumpTimer += delta if self.JumpTimer >= self.JumpTimerMax then self.JumpTimer = 0 self.CanJump = true end end
-- 타일 위 이동 ------------------------- local canGroundMove = self:CanGroundMove()
if self.IsLeftPressing then self.Horizontal = -1 elseif self.IsRightPressing then self.Horizontal = 1 elseif not self.IsLeftPressing and not self.IsRightPressing then self.Horizontal = 0 end
if canGroundMove and math.abs(self.Horizontal) > 0 then self:MoveOnGround(self.Horizontal, self.JumpDirectionPower, self.IsJumping) end
-- 사다리 이동 -------------------------- if self.IsUpPressing then self.Vertical = 1 elseif self.IsDownPressing then self.Vertical = -1 elseif not self.IsUpPressing and not self.IsDownPressing then self.Vertical = 0 end
if isvalid(self.LadderEntity) then self:MoveOnLadder(self.Vertical) end
-- 애님 변경 ----------------------------- local isFalling = (math.abs(self.PhysicsRigidComponent:GetLinearVelocity().y) > self.WalkSpeed and self.CurAnim ~= "LADDER")
if self.IsJumping then if isvalid(self.LadderEntity) then self:RequestAnimChange("LADDER") else self:RequestAnimChange("JUMP") end elseif isFalling then self:RequestAnimChange("FALL") elseif isvalid(self.LadderEntity) then self:RequestAnimChange("LADDER") elseif self.Horizontal == 0 and self.Vertical < 0 then self:RequestAnimChange("CROUCH") elseif math.abs(self.Horizontal) > 0 then self:RequestAnimChange("MOVE") elseif self.IsSitting then self:RequestAnimChange("SIT") else self:RequestAnimChange("IDLE") end
if self.IsJumping then self:CheckJumpErrorStatus(delta) end

CodeBlockMethod.Name: Jump
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
-- ========================================= -- 타일 위에서 점프합니다. -- ========================================= if self.PhysicsRigidComponent:GetLinearVelocity().y < -5 then return end
self.PhysicsRigidComponent:ApplyLinearImpulse(Vector2(0, self.JumpSpeed * 100))
_SoundService:PlaySound("d881a73a0700404a91bcf753474274c3", 1, self.Entity.PlayerComponent.UserId)

CodeBlockMethod.Name: MoveOnGround
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
-- ========================================= -- 타일 위에서 플레이어를 움직입니다. -- ========================================= self.Entity.PlayerControllerComponent.LookDirectionX = horizontal
if horizontal ~= jumpDirection and isJumping then self.PhysicsRigidComponent:ApplyLinearImpulse(Vector2((horizontal) * self.WalkSpeed * 2, 0)) else self.PhysicsRigidComponent:SetLinearVelocityX(horizontal * self.WalkSpeed) end

CodeBlockMethod.Name: MoveOnLadder
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
-- ========================================= -- 사다리를 오릅니다. -- ========================================= if not isvalid(self.LadderEntity) then return end
if self.Entity.TransformComponent.WorldPosition.x ~= self.LadderEntity.TransformComponent.WorldPosition.x then self.PhysicsRigidComponent:SetPosition(Vector2(self.LadderEntity.TransformComponent.WorldPosition.x, self.Entity.TransformComponent.WorldPosition.y)) end
-- ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ -- 사다리 포인트 판정 범위를 변경합니다. -- ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ if vertical < 0 then self.TopLadderSensorEntity.TransformComponent.Position.y = -0.2 self.BottomLadderSensorEntity.TransformComponent.Position.y = -0.35 else self.TopLadderSensorEntity.TransformComponent.Position.y = 0.35 self.BottomLadderSensorEntity.TransformComponent.Position.y = -0.2 end
self.PhysicsRigidComponent:SetLinearVelocity(Vector2(0, (self.ClimbSpeed * vertical)))

CodeBlockMethod.Name: UpOnLadder
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
-- ========================================= -- 사다리를 탑니다. -- ========================================= if not isvalid(self.ClimbableLadderEntity) then return end
if isvalid(self.LadderEntity) then return end
self.Entity.PhysicsColliderComponent.IsSensor = true self.Entity.PhysicsRigidbodyComponent.GravityScale = 0
self.HitZone.PhysicsRigidbodyComponent.Enable = false self.HitZone.PhysicsColliderComponent.Enable = false self.Entity.PhysicsRigidbodyComponent:SetLinearVelocity(Vector2(0,0))
self.LadderEntity = self.ClimbableLadderEntity

CodeBlockMethod.Name: DownOnLadder
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
-- ========================================= -- 사다리에서 떨어집니다. -- ========================================= self.Entity.PhysicsColliderComponent.IsSensor = false
self.HitZone.PhysicsRigidbodyComponent.Enable = true self.HitZone.PhysicsColliderComponent.Enable = true
self.Entity.PhysicsRigidbodyComponent.GravityScale = 2.4
self.LadderEntity = nil self.ClimbableLadderEntity = nil
if isvalid(horizontal) then local xPower = 200 local yPower = 350
if horizontal ~= 0 then local jumpFunction = function() self.Entity.PhysicsRigidbodyComponent:SetLinearVelocity(Vector2(0,0)) self.Entity.PhysicsRigidbodyComponent:ApplyLinearImpulse(Vector2(horizontal * xPower, yPower)) _SoundService:PlaySound("d881a73a0700404a91bcf753474274c3", 1, self.Entity.PlayerComponent.UserId) end _TimerService:SetTimerOnce(jumpFunction, 0.05) end end
self.TopLadderSensorEntity.TransformComponent.Position.y = 0.35 self.BottomLadderSensorEntity.TransformComponent.Position.y = -0.35
self.IsJumpingFromLadder = true
_TimerService:SetTimerOnce(function() self.IsJumpingFromLadder = false end, 0.5)

CodeBlockMethod.Name: InteractWithLadder
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
-- =================================================== -- 사다리와 상호작용합니다. -- =================================================== if isvalid(self.ClimbableLadderEntity) then return end
self.ClimbableLadderEntity = ladderEntity

CodeBlockMethod.Name: SyncAnim
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
-- =================================================== -- 플레이어의 애님을 변경합니다. -- =================================================== local bodyAnim = BodyActionStateChangeEvent() bodyAnim.needResetAction = true
if not isvalid(self.Entity.AvatarRendererComponent:GetBodyEntity()) then return end
local curAnim = self.Entity.AvatarRendererComponent:GetBodyEntity().AvatarBodyActionSelectorComponent.ActionState
if nextAnim == "IDLE" then bodyAnim.ActionState = MapleAvatarBodyActionState.Stand elseif nextAnim == "MOVE" then bodyAnim.ActionState = MapleAvatarBodyActionState.Walk elseif nextAnim == "JUMP" or nextAnim == "FALL" then bodyAnim.ActionState = MapleAvatarBodyActionState.Fall elseif nextAnim == "LADDER" then bodyAnim.ActionState = MapleAvatarBodyActionState.Ladder elseif nextAnim == "CROUCH" then bodyAnim.ActionState = MapleAvatarBodyActionState.Crouch elseif nextAnim == "SIT" then bodyAnim.ActionState = MapleAvatarBodyActionState.Sit end
self.Entity:SendEvent(bodyAnim)

CodeBlockMethod.Name: RequestAnimChange
CodeBlockMethod.Code: -- =================================================== -- 플레이어의 애님 변경을 요청합니다. -- =================================================== local canChangeAnim = (self.PrevAnim ~= nextAnim) if canChangeAnim then self:SetPlayerAnim(nextAnim) self.PrevAnim = nextAnim end

CodeBlockMethod.Name: CanGroundMove
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
-- =================================================== -- 좌 / 우 이동이 가능한지 체크합니다. -- =================================================== local canGroundMove = false
if self.CurAnim == "MOVE" then canGroundMove = true elseif self.CurAnim == "JUMP" then canGroundMove = true elseif self.CurAnim == "FALL" then canGroundMove = true elseif self.CurAnim == "IDLE" then canGroundMove = true elseif self.CurAnim == "SIT" then canGroundMove = true end
return canGroundMove

CodeBlockMethod.Name: OnSyncProperty
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
-- =================================================== -- 플레이어의 애님을 다른 클라에게 동기화합니다. -- =================================================== local player = _UserService.LocalPlayer
if name == "CurAnim" then self:SyncAnim(value) end

CodeBlockMethod.Name: CheckJumpErrorStatus
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
local velocityY = self.Entity.PhysicsRigidbodyComponent:GetLinearVelocity().y local isError = (math.abs(velocityY) < 1)
if not isvalid(self._T.JumpErrorTimer) then self._T.JumpErrorTimer = 0 end
if isError then self._T.JumpErrorTimer += delta else self._T.JumpErrorTimer = 0 end
if self._T.JumpErrorTimer >= 0.15 then self._T.JumpErrorTimer = 0 self.IsJumping = false end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleKeyUpEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
-- =================================================== -- 캐릭터 조작 관련 코드입니다. -- ===================================================
local player = _UserService.LocalPlayer
if player ~= self.Entity then return end
local key = event.key if key == KeyboardKey.LeftArrow or key == KeyboardKey.A then self.IsLeftPressing = false
elseif key == KeyboardKey.RightArrow or key == KeyboardKey.D then self.IsRightPressing = false
elseif key == KeyboardKey.UpArrow or key == KeyboardKey.W then self.IsUpPressing = false
elseif key == KeyboardKey.DownArrow or key == KeyboardKey.S then self.IsDownPressing = false
elseif key == KeyboardKey.C then if self.CurAnim == "IDLE" then self.IsSitting = true end end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleKeyDownEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
-- =================================================== -- 캐릭터 조작 관련 코드입니다. -- =================================================== local player = _UserService.LocalPlayer
if player ~= self.Entity then return end
local key = event.key
if key == KeyboardKey.LeftArrow or key == KeyboardKey.A then self.IsLeftPressing = true self.IsSitting = false
elseif key == KeyboardKey.RightArrow or key == KeyboardKey.D then self.IsRightPressing = true self.IsSitting = false
elseif key == KeyboardKey.UpArrow or key == KeyboardKey.W then self.IsUpPressing = true
elseif key == KeyboardKey.DownArrow or key == KeyboardKey.S then self.IsSitting = false self.IsDownPressing = true
elseif key == KeyboardKey.Space or key == KeyboardKey.LeftAlt then self.IsSitting = false if not self.CanJump then return end if self.CurAnim == "LADDER" then if isvalid(self.LadderEntity) and self.IsBottomLadderTouching and self.IsTopLadderTouching and self.Horizontal ~= 0 then self:DownOnLadder(self.Horizontal) self.JumpDirectionPower = self.Horizontal self.IsJumping = true end else if not self.IsJumping then self:Jump() self.JumpDirectionPower = self.Horizontal self.IsJumping = true end end self.CanJump = false end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleKeyHoldEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
-- =================================================== -- 사다리 조작 관련 코드입니다. -- =================================================== local player = _UserService.LocalPlayer
if self.IsJumpingFromLadder then return end
if player ~= self.Entity then return end
local key = event.key
if key == KeyboardKey.UpArrow or key == KeyboardKey.W then if isvalid(self.ClimbableLadderEntity) and not isvalid(self.LadderEntity) then if self.IsTopLadderTouching and not self.IsBottomLadderTouching then self:UpOnLadder()
elseif self.IsTopLadderTouching and self.IsBottomLadderTouching then self:UpOnLadder() end end
elseif key == KeyboardKey.DownArrow or key == KeyboardKey.S then if isvalid(self.ClimbableLadderEntity) and not isvalid(self.LadderEntity) then if not self.IsTopLadderTouching and self.IsBottomLadderTouching then self:UpOnLadder()
elseif self.IsTopLadderTouching and self.IsBottomLadderTouching then self:UpOnLadder() end end end

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandlePhysicsContactBeginEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code: -- ================================================== -- 다른 물리 오브젝트와 닿을 때, 이벤트를 받을 수 있습니다. -- (TagComponent를 활용해서, 장애물 판정, 넉백 등) -- ================================================== local ContactedBodyEntity = event.ContactedBodyEntity
